items.headline: Cencora Kite Deal Highlights CAR T Growth And Undervalued Share Price Potential
items.summary: Cencora (NYSE:COR) has entered a major U.S. distribution partnership with Kite Pharma, a Gilead company. The agreement focuses on market access and distribution support for FDA approved CAR T cell therapies across U.S. treatment centers. The collaboration is aimed at easing logistical and administrative hurdles for healthcare providers using these personalized cancer treatments. Cencora comes into this Kite agreement with a mixed share price record. The stock is trading at $279.57, with...
